name: Gnome
summary: Small fey-blooded folk. Hardy and charismatic, naturally inclined to illusion magic.

traits.name: Gnome Magic
traits.summary: +1 DC for illusion spells. SLAs at high enough Cha: dancing lights, ghost sound, prestidigitation, speak with animals (1/day each).

traits.name: Hatred
traits.summary: +1 attack vs reptilian and goblinoid creatures.

traits.name: Illusion Resistance
traits.summary: +2 saves vs illusion spells and effects.

traits.name: Obsessive
traits.summary: +2 to one Craft or Profession skill.

traits.name: Weapon Familiarity
traits.summary: Treat any weapon with 'gnome' in its name as martial.
